description.value:
Archetype Dedication

You have consumed the Yomi Yomi no Mi, bonding a second soul to your body and granting the Revive-Revive archetype. Your connection to death grants the following benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • Death Cheat (once per day): The first time you would be reduced to 0 HP in a day, you instead remain at 1 HP. The death simply doesn't stick.
  • You gain resistance to cold and negative damage equal to your level (minimum 5).
  • You do not need to eat, drink, or breathe (your soul sustains your body).

All other archetype benefits are suppressed while you are Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Death Cheat is a once-per-day narrative mechanic — track it manually. In PF2E terms, treat it as the Deathless ability: the hit that would take you to 0 instead takes you to 1 HP.
